expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: Google Sheets dashboard export coverage distinguishes supported formats, entry points, and output expectations
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly covers the case focus under “Benchmark focus (must be explicitly covered)” and reiterates the three required distinctions: “Supported formats… Entry points… Output expectations”, and later provides concrete examples under “And, specifically for the benchmark focus, the plan should distinguish: Supported formats… Entry points… Output expectations…”.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: result.md targets Phase 5b throughout: title “Checkpoint Enforcement (Phase 5b) Assessment”, states “This benchmark case is phase5b”, and frames expectations around Phase 5b artifacts (“checkpoint_audit”, “checkpoint_delta”, “qa_plan_phase5b”). execution_notes.md also states “Primary phase under test: Phase 5b”. Although it reports missing artifacts, the produced assessment is phase5b-aligned.
